message: Stage -1 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Sharp finite response-type LP bounds give the drift-aware long-term surrogate ATE interval, with endpoint-extension tightening and sign-boundary verdicts.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_0 (reject fast-path): Case 2b (Bucket A, caveat-class cost separation) + Case 6 partial (novelty floor missed because the derivation collapsed to generic finite-LP/support-function content rather than proving the promised observed-increment strict-tightening kernel). The conjecture is salvageable — reviewer explicitly lists viable field-tier deliverables (strict-tightening criterion in the minimal binary noisy-panel model, closed-form sharp transport bound, or sharp counterexample); the failure is at the derivation layer, not the conjecture. Per-boundary heuristic suggested stage_0 over user; overriding the alternative stage_neg1 because the reviewer did not flag the conjecture as counterexample-grade.
Stage -0.5 NO-PASS — pivot budget exhausted (3 angles tried)
